name: Baremetrics
description: Monitor Baremetrics subscription analytics for revenue metrics and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Baremetrics at https://app.baremetrics.com
2. Go to Settings → API
3. Copy your API key
4. Enter it below

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Baremetrics data sources are connected and syncing revenue data

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Baremetrics account members with access to revenue data
